lines: A pressure slate lists the first watch below the church: six priests, eleven nuns, fourteen novices, and thirty pilgrims.
The alarm reads REGIONAL CONTAMINATION: OUTER CLOSURE AUTOMATIC. Local release remains disabled.

choices.label: Copy the duty roll and alarm line

questUpdate.log: The closure duty roll names the first watch. A sleeping roll should account for the rest of the congregation.

lines: The automatic seal accepted a regional alarm. No priest or nun below the hill ordered the doors shut.
A blank clearance box waits beneath the sixty-one admitted names.
